leadText: The Black Sludge (Japanese: くろいヘドロ Black Sludge) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It heals the holder if it is Poison-type, but damages the holder otherwise.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If currently held by a Poison-type Pokémon, the holder restores 1/16 of its maximum HP (rounded down, but not less than 1) at the end of each turn. If currently held by a Pokémon that is not Poison-type, the holder takes damage equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (rounded down, but not less than 1) at the end of each turn. Pokémon with the Ability Magic Guard are immune to this damage. In Generation IV , Black Sludge is able to heal the holder regardless of Heal Block . From Generation V onwards, Black Sludge cannot heal Pokémon affected by Heal Block.

sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Held by wild Croagunk and wild Toxicroak (5% chance each) HG SS Route 17 (held by Biker Dale's Gulpin ), Cerulean Cave Indigo Plateau (held by Koga 's Muk during battle) Held by wild Croagunk (5% chance) B W Held by wild Croagunk , wild Trubbish (5% chance each), and wild Garbodor (50% chance) B2 W2 Castelia Sewers Spring Summer , Marine Tube Held by wild Grimer , wild Croagunk , wild Toxicroak , wild Trubbish (5% chance each), wild Muk , and wild Garbodor (50% chance each) X Y Coumarine City Held by wild Croagunk , wild Trubbish (5% chance each), wild Muk , and wild Garbodor (50% chance each) OR AS Held by wild Grimer and wild Trubbish (5% chance each) S M US UM Held by wild Grimer and wild Garbodor S M (5% chance each) Sw Sh Wyndon Stow-on-Side (bargain shop) Held by wild Croagunk Sh , wild Toxicroak Sh , and wild Garbodor (5% chance each) Sw Sh IA Soothing Wetlands Cram-o-matic ( Poison : 2-20 points) BD SP Held by wild Grimer , wild Croagunk , and wild Toxicroak (5% chance each) S V Delibird Presents ( Levincia Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) S V ID Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period B W B2 W2 Chief Golgo's Sableye Japanese September 15 to 28, 2013

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A hold item that gradually restores the HP of Poison-type Pokémon. It inflicts damage on all other types. HG SS B W B2 W2 A held item that gradually restores the HP of Poison-type Pokémon. It inflicts damage on all other types. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It gradually restores HP to Poison-type Pokémon. It damages any other type. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder is a Poison type, this sludge will gradually restore its HP. It damages any other type.
